emails.body: Amerex 2/13 Checkout I am missing the following deals for Mike Swerzbin per Amerex: B American Electric Power 250 MID C 4/1/01- 6/30/01 25 off 23,775 $.0075 fee S Merrill Lynch Capital Services, Inc. 175 NP 15 10/1/01- 12/31/01 25 on 30,800 $.0075 fee B TransAlta Energy Marketing (U.S.) Inc. 260 MID C 3/1/01- 3/31/01 25 off 7,800 $.0075 fee
